prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically outlines a service provided by Active Travel England (ATE) related to government-funded projects in England. While it mentions local authorities in Scotland, Northern Ireland, or Wales that received support from the Levelling Up Fund, the core services of ATE apply only to England.
